module.name: scolvx
module.description: Origin Locator X — next-generation event and origin review GUI. A modern rework of scolv built on the mainx application framework, featuring a cleaner layout with dedicated Location, Magnitudes, Event and Events tabs. All core picking and location functionality is provided by the shared SeisComP GUI library.

option.description: Load origin with given public ID at startup.
Load event with given public ID at startup.
Start in offline mode. No messaging connection is established.
Load event parameters from an XML file and switch to offline mode.
Override the number of days to preload from the database.

parameter.name: loadEventDB
parameter.description: Number of days to read from the database at startup.

parameter.name: Pvel
parameter.description: P-wave reduction velocity used in the travel-time curve display.

parameter.name: drawMapLines
parameter.description: Draw lines from the origin to associated stations on the map.

parameter.name: drawGridLines
parameter.description: Draw grid lines in the polar residual plots.

parameter.name: computeMissingTakeOffAngles
parameter.description: Compute take-off angles for arrivals that do not have them stored.

parameter.name: computeMagnitudesAfterRelocate
parameter.description: Automatically compute magnitudes after a relocation.

parameter.name: computeMagnitudesSilently
parameter.description: Do not ask for confirmation before computing magnitudes automatically.

parameter.name: enableMagnitudeSelection
parameter.description: Allow the user to select which magnitude types to compute.

parameter.name: systemTray
parameter.description: Show a system tray icon with event notifications.

parameter.name: enable
parameter.description: Highlight rows in the event list that require operator action. An event is highlighted if its preferred origin is automatic, or if it is an earthquake with a preliminary status, or if it is marked as not-existing without a certainty set. Events that are confirmed, reviewed, or classified as quarry blast / outside network interest are not highlighted.

parameter.name: color
parameter.description: Background colour applied to highlighted event rows. Specified as R,G,B or R,G,B,A (0-255). The default is a semi-transparent amber that works on both light and dark themes.

parameter.name: export
parameter.description: Path to a script executed when the user clicks the Publish button. The event public ID is passed as the first argument.

parameter.name: export.silentTerminate
parameter.description: Silently terminate a running export script when closing scolvx, instead of asking for confirmation.
